title: Kubernetes Enterprise Support Kubernetes Course
overview: Docker is the world’s leading software containerization platform. Kubernetes is a system created by Google to automate the deployment, scaling and management of containerized applications (like the ones Docker creates). The two combined make life a breeze for anyone needing to transport, install and maintain complex software applications anywhere. Specializing in container orchestration, microservices service mesh (Istio), and immutable infrastructure deployment.
